compiled_state.title: Create check-usage.sh bash wrapper and integration test
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create a thin bash wrapper (check-usage.sh) that calls check_usage.py and propagates exit codes, plus a bash integration test that verifies the full end-to-end exit code contract.

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-usage.sh
- tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh

### check-usage.sh implementation
- Thin wrapper: set -euo pipefail, resolve SCRIPT_DIR, exec python3 check_usage.py "$@"
- Must be executable (chmod +x)
- Exit code passthrough: 0=unlimited, 1=throttled, 2=paused

### test-check-usage.sh implementation
Integration test using tests/lib/assert.sh framework. Mock the OAuth endpoint by:
- Setting USAGE_MOCK_RESPONSE env var to control check_usage.py behavior (or use a stub)
- Testing: CI fallback (no credentials → exit 0), threshold exits (mock responses), 429 handling

### Test approach
The test creates mock fixtures (stub credentials file, mock HTTP responses) and runs check-usage.sh end-to-end, asserting on exit codes and stdout output. This is a behavioral integration test, not a structural grep.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-usage.sh (create)
- tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/check-usage.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-usage.sh
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh
- [ ] Wrapper propagates exit codes correctly
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh
- [ ] Integration test contains at least 4 test cases
  Verify: grep -c "assert_\|_test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: IMPORTANT: Integration test must use mock HTTP responses (stub curl or mock the Python HTTP layer). Never hit the real OAuth endpoint — it rate-limits aggressively.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — check-usage.sh wrapper + 8 integration tests, all pass. Commit 83c49f61.
comments.author: Test
